response.justification: Bogdan brings valuable geospatial/GIS domain expertise directly applicable to routing tiling, and demonstrates strong systems thinking with experience in high-performance, distributed systems. However, his professional C++ experience ended over a decade ago (2015 at National Instruments), while the role requires modern C++ as the primary technical responsibility. His recent decade focuses on TypeScript/Node.js and AI infrastructure, representing a significant technical gap. The candidate shows comfort learning across expertise areas, but would require substantial C++ skills refresh.
strengths: Deep geospatial and mapping domain expertise through GISCollective founding and Green Map GIS application work
Proven ability to architect and operate high-performance distributed systems handling millions of requests per second
Demonstrated comfort learning and working across diverse technical stacks and full-stack system design
concerns: No professional C++ experience for 11+ years; recent decade focused entirely on TypeScript, Node.js, and D
No documented experience building navigation/routing systems or routing tile pipelines despite strong GIS foundation
Current role (re:cinq on TypeScript/AI infrastructure) is distant from the C++ systems engineering work required

key_factors.factor: Low-latency systems and distributed systems experience
